title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 162.371 - Secretary to issue certificates
text:
162.371.  Secretary to issue certificates. — The secretary of the board of education, who shall record the certification of the results of the election and, by order of the board, shall issue certificates of election to the person entitled thereto; and the results of all other propositions submitted must be reported to the secretary of the board, and by him duly entered upon the district records.
(L. 1963 p. 200 § 3-36, A.L. 1967 p. 237, A.L. 1969 S.B. 136, A.L. 1977 H.B. 328, A.L. 1978 H.B. 971) 
(Source: RSMo 1959 §§ 111.255, 165.330)
